name: Digital Desktop Cats
short_description: A cute virtual cat (or two... or three) that lives on your desktop. Feed them, play with them, and enjoy their company while you use your computer.
detailed_description:
Meet your new desktop companion!
This cute and cozy virtual cat pet lives right on your Windows desktop — playfully roaming, napping, and interacting with you while you work, browse, or game.

Whether you're typing up documents or watching videos, your pet cat keeps you company in a charming overlay experience that never gets in the way.

Features

  • Adorable desktop overlay cat that lives outside the game window.

  • Feed, pet, and play with your cat using simple interactions.

  • Always-on experience that runs while you do other things.

  • Distraction-free — like a virtual buddy, not a full-screen app.

  • Completely customize your cat’s look with accessories.

  • Multiple Monitor support.

Perfect for anyone who wants a little happiness on their screen at all times.

❗ Windows OS only❗

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Turkish, Vietnamese, Filipino
